When the Sun tenants Scorpio, and Jupiter and the Moon

When Venus or Mercury or both are posited in the second or
12th house from the Sun in Scorpio, summer corn will grow well.
If, in addition, the Sun be aspected by Jupiter, there would be
bumper crops.
